newTests.name: GET /video/?json via UI proxy returns paginated page (default limit 10)
shows Playwright session panel (name/timeout/vnc/video/headless), not WebDriver panels
keeps disabled Create Session as solid dark grey, not translucent
renders the design-system VncWindow chrome when connected
mirrors Android caps in the curl terminal snippet
uses Appium clients in java / python / js / ts snippets (not Selenium RemoteWebDriver)
puts appium:* caps in alwaysMatch (no proxy, no WebDriver desiredCapabilities set)
defaults to VNC/Video on and HAR/Log off
shows a disabled coming-soon panel and keeps Create Session locked
mirrors Playwright panel options (name, headless) into the Create Session WebSocket query

locks Capabilities body to continuous 6-col clamp (no discrete fr ladder)
keeps Driver tagstrips in magnet solo rows (dividers flush)
clears proxyServer and proxyPort when switching from preset to custom
shows Android panel (session + appium fields), not WebDriver / Playwright panels
wires enableLog, timeZone, env, labels, videoName into selenoid:options
does not hardcode TZ=UTC or labels-only in Java without UI fields
renders vector fingerprint and Сброс / Скачать / Копировать panel actions
invokes create session handler
opens Remote hub pair+magnet panel (URL, timeout|name, resolution, flags, tz/env/labels) after selecting a WebDriver browser
mirrors panel session options into the WebSocket query
wires session options into createSession body
renders Driver panel with Webdriver / Playwright / Android tagstrips

Session video is downloadable via UI /video proxy after delete
